query: SELECT id, nome, loja, SUBSTRING(CAST(dias AS CHAR), 1, 500) as dias_sample, totalAprovados FROM ferias_colaboradores WHERE uploadId = (SELECT id FROM ferias_uploads ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) AND totalAprovados > 0 LIMIT 2;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT id, nome, loja, SUBSTRING(CAST(dias AS CHAR), 1, 500) as dias_sample, totalAprovados FROM ferias_colaboradores WHERE uploadId = (SELECT id FROM ferias_uploads ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) AND totalAprovados > 0 LIMIT 2;
